settings.title: Phytokeratine Technology
settings.description: Plant-based keratin reactivates dormant melanocytes, restoring your hair's natural pigment from within.

settings.title: 100% Natural Ingredients
settings.description: Free from ammonia, peroxide, and harsh chemicals. Safe for daily use and all hair types.

settings.description: Most customers see results within 4-8 weeks. Full treatment takes 60-90 days for permanent change.

settings.title: Apply Daily
settings.description: 5-10 drops of the treatment massaged into the scalp twice a day.

settings.title: Wait 30 Days
settings.description: The phytokeratine begins reactivating your hair's pigment cells.

settings.title: See First Results

settings.title: Full Restoration
settings.description: After 60-90 days, your natural hair colour is fully restored.

settings.title: Life-changing results in 8 weeks
settings.text: After 2 months my greys at the temples are visibly darker. My wife noticed before I even told her I was using something.

settings.title: My confidence is back
settings.text: Three months in and my natural brown is properly back. The free UK delivery was super fast too.

settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: Most customers see noticeable changes within 4-6 weeks. Full results typically appear after 60-90 days of consistent daily use.

settings.question: Is it safe for daily use?
settings.answer: Yes. Forget White is made from natural ingredients with no ammonia, peroxide, or harsh chemicals.

settings.question: Do you deliver across the UK?
settings.answer: Yes. Standard delivery 2-4 working days. Orders over £50 ship free.

settings.question: What if it doesn't work for me?
settings.answer: 30-day money-back guarantee. Return for a full refund — no questions asked.
